title: Kunal Shah's Meta-Story: The Rise of India's Self-Made Tech Billionaire
summary: From humble beginnings to WhatsApp CEO: Kunal Shah's journey reveals the dark underbelly of India's startup ecosystem and the cost of rapid digital transformation. A lesson for every Indian consumer.
meta_title: Kunal Shah's Meta-Story: CRED to WhatsApp CEO — The Breakdown
meta_description: Meta's $900M CRED investment & Kunal Shah's appointment as WhatsApp CEO raises questions about India's startup ecosystem, data sovereignty & the true cost of success.
author: The Breakdown Team
